title: Vlog Style Video Generation from Nano Banana Pro Image
description: A detailed prompt used to generate an image with Nano Banana Pro, which was then converted into a video using Google Veo 3.1. The prompt focuses on creating a realistic, intimate, vlog-style shot of a woman discussing her fashion, including specific camera angles, lighting, expression, and dialogue.
content:
正面を向いた動画風のショットを作成。カメラは顔の高さで固定、被写体の真正面に配置。被写体は姿勢と構図から座っていることが示されている。

構図はシンプルで安定しており、劇的なアングルや目立つカメラの動きはない。照明は[UGCスタイルのショットを考慮した現実的な照明を追加]から。顔ははっきり見える。

被写体の表情は穏やかでリラックスしており、自然なほのかな微笑みを浮かべている。まるでカメラに向かってVlogを語り始めようとしているかのようだ。画質は夜間の屋内で撮影された動画（高画質）を反映しており、フィルター、美化効果、人工的なシャープネス処理は一切施されていない。

空間は個人的な空間として感じられる。ボケはカメラの限界によるもので、人工的な被写界深度効果ではない。全体的な雰囲気は温かく、明るく、親密で、被写体が話し始める直前のリアルなVlogの瞬間を思わせる。

女性のセリフは、「今日のファッションは【ファッションの特徴を追加】がポイントです！」と優しい口調で話しながら服を触っている。最後に笑顔になる。

BGM：Vlog風のファッションの雰囲気に合った音が心地よく流れている。

title: Worm's-Eye Perspective Character Shot (Likeness Preservation)
description: A detailed prompt for generating a cinematic, worm's-eye perspective shot of a character (Beast/creature), focusing on extreme scale distortion using an ultra-wide lens, strict preservation of the reference image's likeness and materials, and dramatic upward rim lighting.
content:
A cinematic worm’s-eye perspective shot of the character captured from ground level, camera almost touching the surface beneath them. Ultra-wide 14–18mm lens. The camera is angled sharply upward, making the character tower massively in frame.

Likeness Preservation:

Maintain exact proportions, eye shape, stylization, and material identity from the reference. Do not humanize or reinterpret anatomy. Perspective exaggeration must come only from camera placement, not redesign.

Composition:

The lowest part of the character dominates the foreground due to proximity to the lens. Boots, feet, lower garment, or base form appear large and imposing. The upper body recedes dramatically upward into the sky or background. Head placed near top third of frame, slightly off-center.

Pose:

Grounded stance. Feet planted firmly. One foot slightly closer to the lens to enhance scale distortion. Upper body calm and controlled. No exaggerated motion. Dominance comes from stillness.

Camera Behavior:

Very close distance to foreground element. Slight horizon tilt for tension. Foreground sharp, upper portion slightly softened by depth falloff.

Lighting:

Strong upward rim light catching edges of the lower silhouette. Secondary side light sculpting volume. Subtle atmospheric haze above to create depth separation. Shadows fall downward toward the lens.

Background:

Sky-like gradient, large empty space above. Light beams or volumetric haze rising upward. No flat studio look.

Surface Detail:

Foreground textures extremely crisp. Material identity preserved exactly. No added wear unless already present.

Emotion:

Monumental. Immovable. The viewer feels physically below the character. Power through perspective alone.

Negative prompt:

No anatomy distortion, no stretched limbs beyond lens effect, no added accessories, no centered symmetry, no neutral studio lighting.

content:
正面を向いた動画風のショットを作成。カメラは顔の高さで固定、被写体の真正面に配置。被写体は姿勢と構図から座っていることが示されている。

構図はシンプルで安定しており、劇的なアングルや目立つカメラの動きはない。照明は[UGCスタイルのショットを考慮した現実的な照明を追加]から。顔ははっきり見える。

被写体の表情は穏やかでリラックスしており、自然なほのかな微笑みを浮かべている。まるでカメラに向かってVlogを語り始めようとしているかのようだ。画質は夜間の屋内で撮影された動画（高画質）を反映しており、フィルター、美化効果、人工的なシャープネス処理は一切施されていない。

空間は個人的な空間として感じられる。ボケはカメラの限界によるもので、人工的な被写界深度効果ではない。全体的な雰囲気は温かく、明るく、親密で、被写体が話し始める直前のリアルなVlogの瞬間を思わせる。

女性のセリフは、「今日のファッションは【ファッションの特徴を追加】がポイントです！」と優しい口調で話しながら服を触っている。最後に笑顔になる。

The outfit blends sporty and cozy casual style, giving her a relaxed yet polished appearance.

She stands indoors against a plain light warm beige wall, allowing full focus on her presence. Soft natural window light creates gentle shadows across her face and clothing, adding depth and cinematic atmosphere. Her hands are gently clasped in front of her body in a candid, relaxed pose, reinforcing her calm and approachable aura.

The image is ultra-realistic and photorealistic in 8K resolution, capturing detailed skin texture, fine freckles, subtle fabric fibers of the velour material, and soft cinematic lighting for a polished yet natural finish.

A photorealistic, intimate close-up selfie of a beautiful young woman lying comfortably on her back across an ornate, richly patterned couch in a cozy indoor home setting. The couch upholstery features intricate floral and baroque-inspired motifs in warm, muted tones, adding texture and visual depth to the background while still keeping the focus entirely on her face.

The camera angle is positioned directly above her, as if she’s holding the phone slightly raised over her head, creating a soft, flattering perspective. Her long, wavy brown hair fans out naturally around her head, spreading across the couch like a halo, with individual strands visible in fine detail. The waves catch the ambient indoor light, showing subtle variations in warm chestnut and caramel undertones.

She is wearing a loose lavender short-sleeve top with delicate horizontal stripes. The fabric looks soft and lightweight, slightly relaxed at the neckline, which falls naturally and casually without appearing posed. The gentle folds of the material create realistic shadows and highlights, enhancing the authenticity of the scene. A delicate, thin necklace rests against her collarbone, catching a soft glimmer of light and adding a subtle elegant touch.

Her face is the focal point—highly detailed and sharply rendered. Her striking bright turquoise-blue eyes look directly into the camera lens, creating an immediate sense of connection with the viewer. The eyes are glossy and reflective, with tiny light reflections visible in the irises, giving them depth and realism. Her lashes are natural yet defined, framing her gaze beautifully.

Her skin texture is realistic and finely detailed—soft, smooth, and luminous under gentle natural indoor lighting. The light appears to be coming from a nearby window, diffused and warm, casting soft highlights across her cheekbones, nose bridge, and forehead while maintaining gentle, flattering shadows along the contours of her face. Subtle variations in skin tone and faint natural imperfections enhance the photorealism.

Her full lips are slightly parted, coated with a subtle gloss that reflects light softly, adding dimension without appearing heavy. There’s a calm, relaxed sensuality in her expression—confident yet effortless. One arm is bent behind her head, lifting her shoulder slightly and creating a natural curve in her posture. The pose feels spontaneous rather than staged, intimate yet refined.

The overall composition emphasizes closeness and authenticity—an 8K ultra-detailed, cinematic-quality selfie with realistic skin texture, soft natural lighting, shallow depth of field, and a warm, inviting indoor atmosphere.

Makeup & Styling
High-gloss Thai celebrity glam inspired by red-carpet Thai actresses and luxury beauty campaigns: perfected radiant glass-skin base with seamless coverage, softly sculpted brows with clean definition, precise espresso-brown eyeliner with a sharp lifted wing, subtly smoked outer corners, tightlined upper lash line, wispy volume lashes, champagne-gold inner corner highlight, sculpted yet natural contour, luminous golden highlighter on cheekbones and nose bridge, vibrant peach-coral blush blended upward toward the temples, and high-shine lacquered coral-rose or warm ruby gloss lips. Pose
Seated confidently in the armchair, torso angled slightly to the side with shoulders relaxed but poised. One leg crossed elegantly. Chin slightly tilted down or to the side for a cinematic feel. Three-quarter body framing.

Soft but directional window light from the left enhanced with subtle studio-style fill for flawless skin rendering. Shallow depth of field with creamy background blur.

Background
Minimal upscale interior corner with a softly textured off-white wall and polished dark wood or warm teak flooring. Clean, refined, modern Thai luxury ambiance.

Mood & Vibe
Elegant, radiant, high-end Thai celebrity aura. Glossy, confident, refined femininity. Cinematic polish with warmth. No harsh shadows, no over-contouring, no messy styling, no text or watermark.

description: A highly specific prompt for an ultra-realistic fashion photo featuring an adult woman reclining on a white sofa surrounded by red roses and petals, with a critical instruction to strictly lock the identity and appearance to a reference image, and including graffiti-style 'Valentine's Day' text on t
content:
Ultra-realistic fashion photo, vertical 9:16 format; IDENTITY LOCK (CRITICAL): use the face from the attached photo as the only identity reference; preserve 100% the exact same appearance without any changes — face shape, eyes, lips, nose, cheekbones, jawline, hairline, hair color and texture, skin tone, natural asymmetry, and micro-texture; DO NOT alter appearance, no rejuvenation, no beautification, no face swap.

Location: bright minimalist room/interior, white wall background, large red “paint” lettering with drips on the wall reading “Valentine’s Day” (graffiti/dripping style), text placed strictly in the upper part of the frame.

In the frame: a large white soft sofa with voluminous cushions; red rose petals scattered on the sofa and around the model. On the right side of the model, on the sofa, lies a very large bouquet of red roses (dense, multi-headed, with green leaves), occupying the right third of the frame.

Model: adult woman, looking directly into the camera, confident and sensual expression, bold red lipstick, light natural makeup, real skin texture (visible pores, micro-contrast, no retouching, no plastic look).

Hair: long, slightly tousled, one strand falling onto the face, soft side part.

Pose: woman lying/reclining diagonally on the white sofa — body extended along the sofa, torso slightly lifted on one elbow, one hand raised to the hair near the temple, the other hand relaxed on the pillow in front of her, shoulders open.

Clothing: fitted red slip dress with thin straps (red satin slip dress / red bodycon slip dress), smooth fabric with soft folds along the waist and hips.

Composition: model positioned left/center, bouquet on the right, “Valentine’s Day” text large at the top of the wall, rose petals on the sofa and near her legs, medium shot (waist/upper thigh and above), slight perspective, camera at eye level or slightly higher.

Lighting: natural soft daylight from a side window (soft window light) + subtle fill, warm soft shadows, atmospheric editorial look.

Optics/quality: photorealistic, editorial, ultra-sharp, high detail, 35mm look, f/2.8–f/4, ISO 100–200, 1/125, HDR, natural skin texture, subtle film grain.

NEGATIVE: different face/appearance, glossy “plastic” skin, heavy retouching/airbrush, CGI/3D, illustration, extra objects, other text, spelling errors, blurred face, extra fingers/deformations.
